subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enkindled with the fire of God's love! Render thou thanks unto the Ancient Beauty, that thou art holding fast unto His divine Covenant and Testament [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مشتعل بنار محبت الله حمد کن جمال کبریا را که بر عهد و میثاق الهی متشبثی و
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @praise and encouragement
